innateAbility.name: Keen Scope
innateAbility.description: The greater the distance between the attacked enemy and Sniper, the greater the attack damage applied.

abilities.name: Shrapnel
abilities.description: Consumes a charge to launch a ball of shrapnel that showers and revealing the target area in explosive pellets.

abilities.name: Headshot
abilities.description: Grants Sniper a chance to deal extra damage and briefly knocks back the attacked enemy unit.

abilities.name: Take Aim
abilities.description: Sniper takes aim with addtional attack range, he is slowed with reduced vision for the duration.

abilities.name: Concussive Grenade
abilities.description: Damages, stuns, and applies a knockback to all affected enemy units within the area-targeted location.

abilities.name: Assassinate
abilities.description: Locks onto a unit-targeted enemy.After a short aiming duration, Sniper fires a devastating shot at long range and mini-stuns the target. 4
